Hardware Component File

N_P33A_PBD_UDS_PT_2021_03_02

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference N_P33A_PBD_UDS_PT_2021_03_02_20210303T112728.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 713
Receive ID 733
Functional Addr A7
Functional Name PBD-PTL

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "16",
    "supplier": "1111",
    "soft": "11111111112222222222333333333344",
    "version": "11111111112222222222333333333344"
  }
]

Associated Devices

[B2427](TBD) Right spindle hall sensor failure ID:

[B242F](TBD) PBD Warning buzzer error ID:
[B2436](TBD) Left spindle failure ID:
[B2437](TBD) Right spindle failure ID:
